items.name: Zoom
items.note: Click zoom in · Alt/Shift+click zoom out

items.name: Movable dialogs
items.note: Drag Preferences, Help, Color Picker, or shape dialogs by the title bar

items.name: Draw over existing objects
items.note: With nothing selected, shape/pen tools click through objects

items.name: Exact-size shape dialog
items.note: Click (no drag) with a shape tool — set width/height/sides/etc.

items.name: Instant tooltips
items.note: Hover toolbar buttons — no native delay

items.name: Wrapping control bar
items.note: Top bar wraps instead of scrolling sideways

items.name: Path anchors (Direct Select)
items.note: Drag · double-click convert · right-click delete · Shift+right-click add

items.name: Bring to front / Send to back
Aspect lock
items.note: Control bar · Shift while scaling also locks

items.name: Default appearance
items.note: Shapes: white fill · black stroke · 1px. Type: black fill · no stroke

items.name: Shape geometry
items.note: Appearance → Shape — width/height, corners, polygon sides, star radii, line length

items.name: Compact Appearance panel
items.note: Collapsible sections — Paint, Stroke, Object, Type

items.name: Stroke width, cap, join, dash, arrow, align
Remove color (chroma key)
items.note: Appearance → Image — per-color tolerance, eyedropper pick

items.name: Font picker ↑/↓
items.note: Arrow keys step fonts in list or search field

items.name: Color picker
items.note: In-app Photoshop-style picker (no OS color panel) — OK keeps · Cancel/Esc reverts · live preview while open

items.name: Swatch library
items.note: Own dock panel — click fill · Shift+click stroke · well opens picker · Add saves to library (stays open)

items.name: Clear artboard
items.note: Control bar — removes objects on the active artboard

items.name: Layers (visibility, lock, reorder, rename)
items.note: Layers panel — drag rows to reorder

items.name: Soft-save / draft recovery
items.note: Silent IndexedDB draft — restores after tab close

items.name: Import SVG / Place image
items.note: Menu bar — place image at native pixel size

items.name: UI themes
items.note: Menu bar or Preferences — Coffee, Synthwave, Illustrator, Paper, Nord, …
